𝗦𝗟𝗢𝗝𝗞𝗔 | A feature-rich, AI-enhanced raster graphics editor for both local and cloud-based image manipulation and generation tasks.  🌟 Rising Fast!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A feature-rich, AI-enhanced raster graphics editor for both local and cloud-based image manipulation and generation tasks.
📅 Created: Jul 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Photoshop-style interface with layers, masks, and selections
✅ Smart layers for lossless transformations
✅ Local AI models for background removal (ISNet) and segmentation (SAM 2.1)
✅ Integration with polza.ai for image generation, upscaling, and object manipulation
✅ AI assistant (Claude Code) for editor control via MCP
✅ Support for Krita (.kpp) and Photoshop (.abr) brushes
✅ Import/export of PSD, ORA, PNG, JPEG, WebP formats
✅ WebGL2 rendering engine


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 35 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 4 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Slojka is an AI-first, Photoshop-style graphics editor built with WebGL2. It offers advanced editing features like layers, masks, and selections, enhanced by local AI models for background removal and object segmentation (SAM 2.1). It also integrates with cloud-based AI services for image generation and editing, and features an AI assistant for command execution.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/HelpFreedom/slojka

𝗗𝗢𝗖𝗞𝗘𝗥-𝗠𝗔𝗜𝗟𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗩𝗘𝗥 | Deploying and managing a self-hosted, feature-rich mail server within a Docker container environment.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Deploying and managing a self-hosted, feature-rich mail server within a Docker container environment.
📅 Created: Mar 2015 • Updated: Jul 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Production-ready fullstack mail server in a container
✅ Includes Postfix, Dovecot, Rspamd, Amavis, SpamAssassin, ClamAV, OpenDKIM, OpenDMARC, Fail2ban, Fetchmail, Getmail6, Postscreen, Postgrey
✅ Supports SMTP, IMAP, POP3, LDAP authentication
✅ Integrates with LetsEncrypt for SSL certificates
✅ Configuration via files, no SQL database required
✅ Includes a setup script for easy configuration and maintenance
✅ Supports OAuth2 authentication


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 18.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 98 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Docker Mailserver provides a production-ready, containerized mail server solution that bundles essential services like Postfix, Dovecot, Rspamd, and ClamAV. It simplifies mail server deployment and management by using only configuration files, making it easy to version, deploy, and upgrade.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/docker-mailserver/docker-mailserver

𝗗𝗘𝗙𝗔𝗖𝗘 | Anonymizing faces in video and image content for privacy preservation.  🌟 Rising Fast!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Anonymizing faces in video and image content for privacy preservation.
📅 Created: Feb 2020 • Updated: Jul 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automatic face detection and anonymization in videos/photos
✅ Supports blurring, black boxes, and image replacement for anonymization
✅ Command-line interface for easy usage
✅ Optional audio track discarding
✅ Support for multiple backends (ONNX Runtime, OpenCV)
✅ Hardware acceleration for faster processing
✅ Live camera feed anonymization


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 172 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 30 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Deface is a Python-based command-line tool that automatically anonymizes faces in videos and photos by detecting them and applying blur or black boxes. It also discards audio tracks by default and supports various anonymization backends and hardware acceleration.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ORB-HD/deface

𝗥𝗨𝗦𝗧𝗡𝗘𝗧 | Real-time, per-process network traffic monitoring and analysis directly from the terminal, bridging the gap between simple connection listing tools and full packet capture analyzers.  🔥 Super Hot!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Real-time, per-process network traffic monitoring and analysis directly from the terminal, bridging the gap between simple connection listing tools and full packet capture analyzers.
📅 Created: Apr 2025 • Updated: Jul 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Per-process attribution of network connections
✅ Deep packet inspection for multiple protocols (HTTP, TLS/SNI, DNS, QUIC, etc.)
✅ Annotated PCAPNG export with process and GeoIP information
✅ Security sandboxing (Landlock, Seatbelt, Windows token privilege drop)
✅ TCP network analytics (retransmissions, out-of-order packets)
✅ Vim/fzf-style filtering
✅ GeoIP enrichment
✅ Kubernetes attribution (optional)
✅ Cross-platform support (Linux, macOS, Windows, FreeBSD)


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 216 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 10 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

RustNet is a cross-platform, terminal-based network monitoring tool that provides per-process visibility into live TCP, UDP, and QUIC connections. It features deep packet inspection for various protocols and offers enhanced security through sandboxing mechanisms.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/domcyrus/rustnet

𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗖𝗧 | To provide a decentralized and cost-effective cloud storage solution by utilizing the Telegram messaging platform as the underlying storage medium.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a decentralized and cost-effective cloud storage solution by utilizing the Telegram messaging platform as the underlying storage medium.
📅 Created: Oct 2023 • Updated: Jul 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Unlimited file cloud storage using Telegram API
✅ Minimal server disk space usage
✅ No reliance on server filesystem or paid cloud storage
✅ REST API for integration
✅ Personal or multi-user deployment options
✅ Dockerized deployment with Postgres database


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 227 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 22 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Pentaract is a cloud storage system that leverages the Telegram API for storage, minimizing server disk space usage and eliminating the need for external cloud services. It offers a REST API for integration and can be deployed personally or for multiple users.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗟-𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗢-𝗘𝗡𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗘𝗥 | Enhancing the quality and resolution of video content through AI-powered interpolation, upscaling, decompression, and denoising, accessible via a user-friendly interface on multiple operating systems.  🔥 Super Hot!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enhancing the quality and resolution of video content through AI-powered interpolation, upscaling, decompression, and denoising, accessible via a user-friendly interface on multiple operating systems.
📅 Created: Feb 2023 • Updated: Jul 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✅ Video interpolation and upscaling
✅ Decompression and denoising
✅ Cross-platform support (Windows, Linux, macOS)
✅ Graphical User Interface (GUI)
✅ Support for advanced AI models (RIFE, GMFSS, IFRNet, Real-ESRGAN)
✅ Optimized inference with TensorRT and NCNN backends
✅ Scene change detection
✅ Real-time preview

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

REAL Video Enhancer is a Python-based application designed to improve video quality by interpolating frames, upscaling resolution, decompressing, and denoising content. It supports Windows, Linux, and macOS, offering a user-friendly GUI and leveraging advanced AI models and backends like TensorRT and NCNN for efficient processing.
